overall.description: Static view of a grand medieval dining hall from a video game (Hogwarts Legacy), featuring floating candle chandeliers, long dining tables filled with students, and towering stained glass windows. A translucent ghostly figure stands in the right foreground observing the scene.

scene_state.functional_zone: gothic great hall with floating candles and house dining tables

agents.ego_description: translucent blue ghostly figure standing in the right foreground, occasionally gesturing while observing the dining hall

segments.scene_description: The camera holds a static view of a magnificent gothic great hall illuminated by hundreds of floating candles. Long dining tables stretch down the center and sides of the hall, filled with students in dark robes eating and conversing. A translucent ghostly figure stands in the right foreground observing the scene. The architecture features soaring stone arches and a massive stained glass window at the far end, with house banners hanging from the walls.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a steady, atmospheric gaze across a magnificent gothic great hall where the stillness of the architecture contrasts with the subtle movement of its inhabitants. It begins with a wide view of the soaring stone arches and house banners, illuminated by the soft glow of hundreds of floating candles. As the eye wanders across the space, the focus settles on the long dining tables filled with students in dark robes engaged in quiet conversation. The scene then expands to reveal a translucent ghostly figure standing in the right foreground, observing the activity before the perspective settles on the massive stained glass window anchoring the far end of the hall.
